personalInfo.name: Md Parvez Hasan
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer
personalInfo.tagline: Crafting elegant digital experiences with modern web technologies

paragraphs: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience building modern web applications. My journey into programming started during college when I built my first website — and I've been hooked ever since.

I specialize in creating performant, accessible, and visually stunning applications using React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. I believe great software is born from the intersection of clean code and thoughtful design.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring open-source projects, writing technical articles, or hiking in the mountains. I'm always eager to learn new technologies and collaborate with talented people.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.description: Graduated with honors. Focused on software engineering, data structures, and web technologies. Led the university's coding club.
Science stream with Mathematics. Scored top marks in Computer Science and participated in state-level programming competitions.

responsibilities: Lead frontend architecture for a SaaS platform serving 50K+ users
Implemented design system reducing UI inconsistencies by 80%
Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews
Built end-to-end web applications using React and Node.js
Integrated third-party APIs and payment gateways
Optimized database queries improving performance by 40%
Developed responsive UI components using React and Tailwind CSS
Collaborated with designers to translate Figma mockups into code
Wrote unit tests achieving 85% code coverage

projects.name: ShopVista — E-Commerce Platform
projects.shortDescription: A full-featured e-commerce platform with cart management, payment integration, and admin dashboard.
projects.overview: ShopVista is a modern e-commerce solution built for small to medium businesses. It features a responsive storefront, real-time inventory management, and a comprehensive admin panel for managing products, orders, and customers.
challenges: Implementing real-time inventory updates across multiple sessions
Building a secure payment flow with Stripe webhooks
Optimizing image loading for product catalogs with 1000+ items

projects.name: TaskFlow — Project Management App
projects.shortDescription: A Kanban-style project management tool with real-time collaboration and drag-and-drop functionality.
projects.overview: TaskFlow helps teams organize their work with an intuitive Kanban board interface. Features include real-time updates, file attachments, deadline tracking, and team collaboration tools.
challenges: Implementing smooth drag-and-drop across columns with state persistence
Building real-time sync with WebSockets for multi-user editing
Handling offline mode with local storage and sync on reconnect
improvements: Add Gantt chart view for timeline visualization
Integrate with Slack and GitHub for notifications
Build a mobile app using React Native

projects.name: SkyCast — Weather Forecast App
projects.shortDescription: A beautiful weather application with 7-day forecasts, location search, and interactive weather maps.
projects.overview: SkyCast delivers accurate weather data with a stunning visual interface. Users can search any location, view hourly and weekly forecasts, and explore interactive weather maps with radar data.
challenges: Parsing and normalizing data from multiple weather API endpoints
Creating responsive and animated weather visualizations
Implementing accurate geolocation with fallback mechanisms
improvements: Add severe weather alerts and push notifications
Add air quality index and UV tracking
